case_title: RICHARD E THOMAS VS. CHET BENTLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM BENTLEY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100027141) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, RICHARD E

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS IN SUPPORT OF CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND COMMON COUNTS SHOWING THAT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE MINDFUL OF THE "SHAM PLEADING" DOCTRINE. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION AND RELIANCE ON RELATION BACK DOCTRINE IS NOT WELL-TAKEN AS PLAINTIFF DID NOT AVAIL HIMSELF OF CCP 474 AND DID NOT SUBSTITUTE WILLIAM BENTLEY IN PLACE OF A DOE. SEE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT AND FAC - BOTH PLEADINGS NAME DOES 1-10, I.E. FAC DOES NOT NAME "CHET BENTLEY, WILLIAM BENTLEY AS DOE 1, AND DOES 2-10", IT NAMES "CHET BENTLEY, WILLIAM BENTLEY AND DOES 1-10". PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Apr-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard M. Fannan (323-340-8957) for Defendant/Moving party Chet Bentley via courtcall.
No other appearances.

Not argued. Defense did not comply with tentative ruling rule. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts in support of causes of action for breach of contract and common counts showing that these causes of action are not barred by the statute of limitations. Plaintiff shall be mindful of the "sham pleading" doctrine. Plaintiff's opposition and reliance on relation back doctrine is not well-taken as Plaintiff did not avail himself of CCP 474 and did not substitute William Bentley in place of a Doe. See original complaint and FAC - both pleadings name Does 1-10, i.e. FAC does not name "Chet Bentley, William Bentley as Doe 1, and Does 2-10", it names "Chet Bentley, William Bentley and Does 1-10". Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM BENTLEY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

To be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. That department handles all real property lease disputes per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
